children.heading: Production history
children.label: a Production history
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), the production history of a dairy operation for dairy margin coverage is equal to the highest annual milk marketings of the participating dairy operation during any 1 of the 2021, 2022, or 2023 calendar years.

children.heading: Election by new dairy operations
children.label: b Election by new dairy operations

children.text: The volume of the actual milk marketings for the months the participating dairy operation has been in operation extrapolated to a yearly amount.

An estimate of the actual milk marketings of the participating dairy operation based on the herd size of the participating dairy operation relative to the national rolling herd average data published by the Secretary.

children.heading: Required information
children.label: c Required information
children.text: A participating dairy operation shall provide all information that the Secretary may require in order to establish the production history of the participating dairy operation for purposes of participating in dairy margin coverage.

children.heading: Limitation on changes to business structure
children.label: d Limitation on changes to business structure
children.text: The Secretary may not make dairy margin coverage payments to a participating dairy operation if the Secretary determines that the participating dairy operation has reorganized the structure of such operation solely for the purpose of qualifying as a new operation under subsection (b).
